prompt: Create a realistic nighttime street photography scene in a dense Korean entertainment alley. The main subject is one adult Korean woman, early 20s, standing in three-quarter profile beside a brightly lit drink vending machine on the left side of the frame. She has long dark brown to black hair, natural makeup, a calm slightly curious expression, and looks back toward the camera while pressing a vending-machine button with her right index finger. Her left hand holds a smartphone. She wears a fitted charcoal black long-sleeve deep V-neck top, a black high-waisted cargo mini skirt with visible pockets and belt loops, and a small black shoulder bag with a thin strap over her right shoulder. The composition should be vertical portrait, waist-to-thigh full body crop, subject centered slightly right, vending machine dominating the left foreground with glowing rows of colorful canned and bottled drinks behind glass, visible round selection buttons, cool white and blue light spill on her face and clothes. In the background, show exactly 4 prominent vending-related machines or kiosks: 1 large drink vending machine in the foreground at left, 2 smaller illuminated drink vending machines receding in the alley behind her, and 1 cream-colored capsule toy machine on the far right. The alley is narrow, wet, and reflective after rain, with dark concrete walls, exposed pipes, utility fixtures, neon signs, blue-white light boxes, and colorful bokeh lights in the distance. Use shallow depth of field, cinematic realism, high dynamic range, detailed skin texture, glossy wet pavement reflections, moody urban nightlife atmosphere, 35mm street-photo perspective, natural pose, no text overlays, no watermark, no extra people.

The main subject is one adult Korean woman, early 20s, standing in three-quarter profile beside a brightly lit drink vending machine on the left side of the frame. promptZh: 创作一张写实的夜间街头摄影作品，场景位于拥挤的韩国娱乐巷弄。主体是一位 20 出头的韩国成年女性，以四分之三侧面站立在画面左侧一台明亮的饮料自动售货机旁。她拥有 深棕至黑色长发，妆容自然，表情平静且略带好奇，正转头看向镜头，右手食指按在自动售货机的按钮上。她的左手拿着一部智能手机。她身穿一件合身的 炭黑色 长袖深 V 领上衣，搭配一条黑色高腰工装迷你裙（带有明显的口袋和腰带环），右肩背着一个小巧的黑色单肩包。构图应为竖向人像，取景范围为腰部至大腿的全身剪裁，主体略微偏右，左侧前景由自动售货机占据，玻璃后陈列着发光的彩色罐装和瓶装饮料，可见圆形的选购按钮，冷白和蓝色的光线洒在她的脸部和衣物上。背景中需准确展示 4 台显眼的售货相关机器或售货亭：左侧前景为 1 台大型饮料自动售货机，她身后的巷弄中向远处延伸有 2 台较小的发光饮料自动售货机，最右侧为 1 台奶油色的扭蛋机。巷弄狭窄、潮湿，雨后地面有倒影，背景可见深色混凝土墙面、裸露的管道、公用设施、霓虹灯牌、蓝白灯箱以及远处的彩色虚化光斑。采用浅景深、电影级写实风格、高动态范围，呈现细腻的皮肤纹理、湿润路面的光泽倒影、忧郁的都市夜生活氛围、35mm 街拍视角、自然的姿态，无文字遮罩，无水印，无额外人物。
